{"step_by_step_thinking": "The question asks about the cells that proliferate from top to bottom of the villi in the small intestine. As they move from the base (crypts) toward the top (villi), they differentiate into various cell types, including enterocytes, goblet cells, Paneth cells, and enteroendocrine cells.
